title: Five Italians die in Maldives cave-diving accident | CNN
text:
Source: Reuters

Five Italian nationals have died following ascuba diving accidentin theMaldives, Italy’s foreign ministry said on Thursday.

The incident occurred in the Vaavu Atoll, where the group had been attempting to explore a series of underwater caves at a depth of around 50 meters (165 feet), the foreign ministry statement said.

It did not give any details about the identities of the victims or the exact cause of the accident.

The foreign ministry said an investigation was underway, adding that the Italian Embassy in Sri Lanka was working to contact the victims’ families and provide consular assistance.
